description: Fix missing modern CSS4 HSL parsing in icon validation and remove dead code in plugin build pipeline.

userStories.title: Add modern CSS4 space-separated HSL parsing to icon validation
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want SVG icons using modern HSL syntax (e.g., hsl(120 50% 50%)) to be correctly detected as chromatic and converted to grayscale for inactive icons.
acceptanceCriteria: parseColor handles modern space-separated HSL syntax: hsl(H S% L%) and hsl(H S% L% / A)
parseColor handles modern space-separated HSLA syntax: hsla(H S% L% / A)
isAchromaticColor fast-path HSL regex matches both comma-separated and space-separated syntax
convertColorToGray handles both comma-separated and space-separated HSL syntax
validateInactiveIconColors flags chromatic colors in modern HSL syntax (not silently passing them as achromatic)
generateInactiveIcon converts modern HSL chromatic colors to grayscale
Unit tests cover: hsl(120 50% 50%), hsl(0 0% 50%) (achromatic), hsla(120 50% 50% / 0.5), hsl(120 50% 50% / 1)
npm run build passes
npm run type-check passes
npm run lint passes
npm run knip passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes:
File: platform/plugin-tools/src/validate-icon.ts. Three functions need updates:

1. parseColor (line 247): Add a modern HSL regex after the existing comma-separated one. Pattern: /^hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s+([\d.]+)%\s+([\d.]+)%(?:\s*\/\s*[\d.]+%?)?\s*\)$/. If matched, call hslToRgb with the parsed values. Place this right after the existing hslMatch block (after line 250).

2. isAchromaticColor (line 271): Update the fast-path HSL regex to also match space-separated syntax. Current regex: /^hsla?\(\s*[\d.]+\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%/. Either use two regexes or combine into one that matches both comma and space separators: /^hsla?\(\s*[\d.]+[\s,]+([\d.]+)%/. The saturation group capture position stays the same.

3. convertColorToGray (line 411-421): Add a modern HSL regex match. Current only handles comma-separated. Add a second regex: /^(hsla?)\(\s*([\d.]+)\s+[\d.]+%\s+([\d.]+)%(.*)\)$/. When matched, reconstruct as `${func}(${hue} 0% ${lightness}%${rest})`.

Existing tests are in platform/plugin-tools/src/validate-icon.test.ts. Add test cases for modern HSL parsing, achromatic detection, and grayscale conversion with space-separated syntax.

userStories.title: Remove dead code: unreachable access check after writeFile in build
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want dead code removed so that the codebase stays clean and does not mislead future maintainers.
acceptanceCriteria: The access() check on the IIFE file (lines 1101-1111) is removed — the file was just written on line 1100 so the check always succeeds
The console.log for the IIFE file size runs unconditionally after writeFile
The 'not generated' else branch is removed entirely
The source map file access check (lines 1114-1119) is NOT removed — that file is generated by esbuild and may genuinely not exist if source maps are disabled
npm run build passes
npm run type-check passes
npm run lint passes
npm run knip passes
npm run test passes
